_comment: InitechDOS Approved Diagnostic Message Catalogue -- LOCKED spec-data
(CLAUDE.md Rule 8). Transcribed VERBATIM from ADR-0003 Appendix C.
DEC-13 (Sec 5.13): controlled vocabulary -- no entry shall be added,
removed, reworded, capitalized, punctuated, or otherwise modified except
by an approved change to the Record. '%c' denotes a drive letter
substitution. Spacing and punctuation are part of the controlled

messages.MSG-DOS-0013: Insert disk with COMMAND.COM in drive %c:
messages.MSG-DOS-0019: Invalid path, not directory, or directory not empty
